description_long: This vending machine is a retro-styled, weathered unit with a rectangular body and a prominent upper section featuring a display panel. The front is divided into two main color blocks: a faded red lower half with the words 'ICE COLD' and a white upper half with a large, distressed 'Nuka-Cola' sign. The machine has a coin slot, a lever, and a rectangular retrieval door on the front, all showing signs of heavy use and grime. The sides are adorned with circular vents and a round Nuka-Cola logo, while the back reveals mechanical components and a grated panel. The overall surface is metallic, with visible rust, scratches, and dirt, giving it a rugged, post-apocalyptic appearance.
description: A weathered, retro Nuka-Cola vending machine with a red and white body, prominent branding, and visible mechanical details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Nuka-Cola' sign, coin slot, lever, and product retrieval door, with 'ICE COLD' text on the lower section.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a circular vent and the machine's boxy, metallic structure with visible wear and rust.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing mechanical components, a grated panel, and the machine's rugged, industrial back.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring a round Nuka-Cola logo and additional paneling, with visible hinges and weathering.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is located at the top front of the machine, bordered in metal, with a dark screen or window, possibly for instructions or branding.
attribute_payment_interface: A coin slot and lever are present on the front left side, with a rectangular slot for coin insertion and a mechanical lever for operation.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A single button or lever is visible on the front, with no clear keypad or multiple selection buttons.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular retrieval door is located on the lower right front, with a handle and a flap for accessing dispensed products.
attribute_branding_or_signage: A large, distressed 'Nuka-Cola' sign in white script on a red background is prominently displayed on the upper front, with a round Nuka-Cola logo on the right side.
